default.notes: Public WebVM Debian image. Used as a fallback so the page boots even before the rust-alpine release pipeline has run; cargo/rustup work from inside via apt + curl. The page-side workspace store still serves /workspace/hello_world.rs to the Explorer regardless of which disk is mounted.

warm.notes: Pre-baked rust-alpine.ext2 — i386 Alpine + bash + rustc + cargo + a hello-world Cargo project under /workspace/hello. Built by web/disk/build.sh and uploaded as the rolling 'disk-latest' release asset on every push to main by .github/workflows/disk-image.yml. The boot shell tries this first; if it 404s (e.g. before the workflow has run), the page falls back to `default` so the workbench and terminal still come up.
